CustomField.description: Check this option to enable drag select. To drag select, click & hold the mouse button for 2 seconds, then drag around objects to select them. Disable this option if you are experiencing issues with panning.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this option to enable drag select. To drag select, click & hold the mouse button for 2 seconds, then drag around objects to select them. Disable this option if you are experiencing issues with panning.
CustomField.label: Enable Drag Select
